name: esp32-cpp
description: A from-scratch, int8-quantized transformer inference engine for ESP32 -- a llama.cpp-style runtime scaled down for microcontrollers. Runs tiny (typically under ~15M parameter) transformer models loaded from a compiled-in C array or from LittleFS/SD. Requires the native engine in firmware/ to be compiled into your sketch first -- see firmware/INTEGRATION.md. main.lua is the part that installs and runs normally through app-installer once the native piece is flashed.
author: you
